'''âdh-k-n''' ('''kadhakan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teend|teend]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teend|teend]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-k-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadhakan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhakan|thidhakan]] || [[word:jidhakan|jidhakan]] || [[word:shidhakan|shidhakan]] || [[word:kidhakan|kidhakan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhakan|thuthudhakan]] || [[word:jujudhakan|jujudhakan]] || [[word:shushudhakan|shushudhakan]] || [[word:kukudhakan|kukudhakan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhakan|thudhakan]] || [[word:judhakan|judhakan]] || [[word:shudhakan|shudhakan]] || [[word:kudhakan|kudhakan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhakan|thudhakan]] || [[word:judhakan|judhakan]] || [[word:shudhakan|shudhakan]] || [[word:kudhakan|kudhakan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhakan|thedhakan]] || [[word:jedhakan|jedhakan]] || [[word:shedhakan|shedhakan]] || [[word:kedhakan|kedhakan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhakan|thothodhakan]] || [[word:jojodhakan|jojodhakan]] || [[word:shoshodhakan|shoshodhakan]] || [[word:kokodhakan|kokodhakan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakan|thodhakan]] || [[word:jodhakan|jodhakan]] || [[word:shodhakan|shodhakan]] || [[word:kodhakan|kodhakan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakan|thodhakan]] || [[word:jodhakan|jodhakan]] || [[word:shodhakan|shodhakan]] || [[word:kodhakan|kodhakan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhakan|thĂŠdhakan]] || [[word:jĂŠdhakan|jĂŠdhakan]] || [[word:shĂŠdhakan|shĂŠdhakan]] || [[word:kĂŠdhakan|kĂŠdhakan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhakan|thathadhakan]] || [[word:jajadhakan|jajadhakan]] || [[word:shashadhakan|shashadhakan]] || [[word:kakadhakan|kakadhakan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhakan|thadhakan]] || [[word:jadhakan|jadhakan]] || [[word:shadhakan|shadhakan]] || [[word:kadhakan|kadhakan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhakan|thadhakan]] || [[word:jadhakan|jadhakan]] || [[word:shadhakan|shadhakan]] || [[word:kadhakan|kadhakan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhakan|shadhakan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhakan|goshadhakan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhakan|gokishadhakan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhakanĂŒ|shadhakanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakanknĂŒ|goshadhakanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakanĂŒ|gokishadhakanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhakanshĂ«|shadhakanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhakankshĂ«|goshadhakankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhakanshĂ«|gokishadhakanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakanro|shadhakanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakankro|goshadhakankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakanro|gokishadhakanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakanmu|shadhakanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakankmu|goshadhakankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakanmu|gokishadhakanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhakansher|shadhakansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhakanksher|goshadhakanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhakansher|gokishadhakansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhakang|shadhakang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhakankng|goshadhakankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhakang|gokishadhakang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhakanya|shadhakanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhakankya|goshadhakankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhakanya|gokishadhakanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhakanyam|shadhakanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhakankyam|goshadhakankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhakanyam|gokishadhakanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakanĂŒshĂ«|shadhakanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakanknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhakanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakanĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhakanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakanĂŒro|shadhakanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakanknĂŒro|goshadhakanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakanĂŒro|gokishadhakanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakanĂŒmu|shadhakanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakanknĂŒmu|goshadhakanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakanĂŒmu|gokishadhakanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakanshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhakanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhakankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhakanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakanshĂ«ro|shadhakanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakankshĂ«ro|goshadhakankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakanshĂ«ro|gokishadhakanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakanshĂ«mu|shadhakanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakankshĂ«mu|goshadhakankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakanshĂ«mu|gokishadhakanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakanronĂŒ|shadhakanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakankronĂŒ|goshadhakankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakanronĂŒ|gokishadhakanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakanroshĂ«|shadhakanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakankroshĂ«|goshadhakankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakanroshĂ«|gokishadhakanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakanromu|shadhakanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakankromu|goshadhakankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakanromu|gokishadhakanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakanmunĂŒ|shadhakanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakankmunĂŒ|goshadhakankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakanmunĂŒ|gokishadhakanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakanmushĂ«|shadhakanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakankmushĂ«|goshadhakankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakanmushĂ«|gokishadhakanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakanmuro|shadhakanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakankmuro|goshadhakankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakanmuro|gokishadhakanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
